name: PFC CI/CD Pipeline & Delivery Ontology
description: Semantic model for the PF-Core hub-and-spoke CI/CD architecture. Defines the topology, repository triads, release pipelines, promotion steps, version pinning, core protection layers, and series-filtered ontology distribution that govern platform delivery across PFI instances.
oaa:domain: CI/CD Pipeline, Platform Delivery, DevOps Governance

creator.name: Platform Foundation Core - Ontology Architect Agent

entities.name: CICDTopology
entities.description: The overall hub-and-spoke CI/CD architecture connecting a central hub repository to multiple PFI instance triads via automated release and promotion pipelines.

oaa:properties.name: hubRepository
oaa:properties.description: GitHub owner/repo of the hub (e.g. ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA)

entities.name: Repository
entities.description: A GitHub repository with a defined role within the CI/CD topology — hub, spoke-dev, spoke-test, spoke-prod, or conventions tier.

oaa:properties.name: reviewsRequired
oaa:properties.description: Minimum PR reviews (0 for multi-dev, 1+ for team)

entities.name: Triad
entities.description: A dev/test/prod trio of repositories representing a single PFI instance or the conventions pipeline, with defined promotion paths between tiers.

entities.name: Pipeline
entities.description: A logical CI/CD pipeline that orchestrates one or more workflows to achieve a delivery objective — core release, convention sync, or instance promotion.

entities.name: Workflow
entities.description: A GitHub Actions workflow file (.yml) implementing part or all of a pipeline, with defined triggers, jobs, and concurrency controls.

oaa:properties.name: triggerEvents
oaa:properties.description: JSON array of trigger events (push, workflow_dispatch, workflow_call)

entities.name: PromotionStep
entities.description: A controlled promotion of code and configuration from one tier to the next (dev→test, test→prod), with review requirements and scope controls.

oaa:properties.name: enforcesAdmins
oaa:properties.description: Whether admin override is blocked on target

oaa:properties.name: promotedPaths
oaa:properties.description: Paths promoted (e.g. instance-data/, pfc-core/, supabase/, tools/)

entities.name: Release
entities.description: A versioned release event that distributes filtered core content from the hub to one or more PFI spoke dev repos via automated PRs.

entities.name: ReleaseArtifact
entities.description: A file written to a PFI dev repo as part of a release — filtered registry snapshot, version pin, or documentation artifact.

oaa:properties.name: targetPath
oaa:properties.description: Destination path in target repo (e.g. pfc-core/ontology-registry.json)

oaa:properties.name: filterBySeries
oaa:properties.description: Whether content is filtered by PFI series subscription

entities.name: VersionPin
entities.description: A version tracking file that records the last deployed version of a component (core content or conventions) in a PFI repo.

oaa:properties.name: currentValue
oaa:properties.description: Current version tag stored in file

oaa:properties.name: checkedBy
oaa:properties.description: Workflow that reads this pin (e.g. pfc-release.yml)

entities.name: ProtectionLayer
entities.description: A security or governance mechanism that protects the pfc-core/ directory from unauthorised human modification in PFI repos.

oaa:properties.name: enforcer
oaa:properties.description: What enforces this layer (e.g. GitHub visibility, guard-core.yml, CODEOWNERS file)

oaa:properties.name: bypassActors
oaa:properties.description: Actors allowed to bypass (e.g. github-actions[bot], dependabot[bot])

entities.name: SeriesFilter
entities.description: A jq-based filter that selects ontology entries from the hub registry based on a PFI's subscribed series, producing a filtered snapshot.

oaa:properties.name: excludePaths
oaa:properties.description: Path prefixes excluded from filter output

entities.name: PFITarget
entities.description: A PFI instance that receives releases from the hub — defined by its dev repo, version pin policy, series subscription, and licence tier.

oaa:properties.name: devRepo
oaa:properties.description: GitHub owner/repo of dev tier (e.g. ajrmooreuk/pfi-baiv-aiv-dev)

oaa:properties.name: pfcPin
oaa:properties.description: Version pin — 'latest' or specific tag like 'pfc-v1.0.0'

entities.name: ConventionManifest
entities.description: Manifest of convention files (workflows, configs, templates) synced from the azlan-workflow conventions triad to PFI prod repos.

oaa:properties.name: triggerTag
oaa:properties.description: Tag pattern that triggers sync (e.g. vN.N.N)

relationships.name: Has Repository
relationships.description: A topology contains repositories with defined roles

relationships.name: Has Triad
relationships.description: A topology contains dev/test/prod triads

relationships.name: Contains Repo
relationships.description: A triad contains exactly 3 repositories (dev, test, prod)

relationships.name: Has Pipeline
relationships.description: A topology has pipelines for release, sync, and promotion

relationships.name: Implemented By
relationships.description: A pipeline is implemented by one or more GitHub Actions workflows

relationships.name: Has Promotion Step
relationships.description: A triad defines promotion steps between its tiers

relationships.name: Produces
relationships.description: A pipeline produces releases when triggered

relationships.name: Includes Artifact
relationships.description: A release includes artifacts written to target repos

relationships.name: Has Version Pin
relationships.description: A repository has version pins tracking deployed content

relationships.name: Protected By
relationships.description: A repository is protected by security/governance layers

relationships.name: Targets Instance
relationships.description: A release targets one or more PFI instances

relationships.name: Orchestrated By
relationships.description: Cross-ontology: a workflow is orchestrated by an EMC event chain

relationships.name: Governed By
relationships.description: Cross-ontology: protection layers are governed by a GRC governance framework

relationships.name: Owned By Organisation
relationships.description: Cross-ontology: a PFI target is owned by an organisation

relationships.name: Delivers Process
relationships.description: Cross-ontology: a pipeline delivers a PE process definition

relationships.name: Tracks Project
relationships.description: Cross-ontology: a release tracks a PPM project

relationships.name: Measured By
relationships.description: Cross-ontology: a release is measured by KPI metrics

relationships.name: Aligns To Strategy
relationships.description: Cross-ontology: the CI/CD topology aligns to a VSOM strategy

relationships.name: Filtered By
relationships.description: A PFI target has its ontology content filtered by a series filter during release

relationships.name: Syncs Conventions
relationships.description: A pipeline syncs convention files defined in a convention manifest to target repos

businessRules.name: Triad Composition
businessRules.description: PFI instance triads must contain exactly 3 repositories (dev, test, prod)
businessRules.action: THEN Triad MUST contain exactly 3 Repositories with roles spoke-dev, spoke-test, and spoke-prod

businessRules.name: Prod Tier Admin Enforcement
businessRules.description: Promotion to prod must enforce admin restrictions

businessRules.name: Core Protection Completeness
businessRules.description: Repos with pfc-core/ scope must have all 3 protection layers
businessRules.condition: IF Repository has role spoke-dev or spoke-test or spoke-prod
businessRules.action: THEN Repository MUST have 3 ProtectionLayers: private-repo, guard-workflow, and codeowners

businessRules.name: Tag Release Targets All Latest
businessRules.description: Tag-triggered releases must target all PFIs pinned to latest
businessRules.action: THEN Release MUST target all PFITargets where pfcPin equals 'latest'

businessRules.name: Pin Mismatch Skip
businessRules.description: PFIs pinned to a different version must be skipped
businessRules.condition: IF PFITarget.pfcPin is not 'latest' AND PFITarget.pfcPin does not equal Release.releaseTag
businessRules.action: THEN Release MUST skip this PFITarget

businessRules.name: Dev-to-Test Promotion
businessRules.condition: IF PromotionStep.sourceRole equals 'spoke-dev' AND targetRole equals 'spoke-test'

businessRules.name: Test-to-Prod Review Gate
businessRules.condition: IF PromotionStep.sourceRole equals 'spoke-test' AND targetRole equals 'spoke-prod'

businessRules.name: Empty Filter Prevention
businessRules.description: Series filter must produce at least one ontology
businessRules.action: THEN pipeline MUST raise a configuration error and abort release for this PFI

businessRules.name: Concurrency Control
businessRules.description: Pipeline concurrency must match pipeline type behaviour
businessRules.action: THEN Workflow.cancelInProgress MUST be false for core-release (no cancellation) and MAY be true for pages-deploy

businessRules.name: PFI Repo Visibility
businessRules.description: All PFI repos must be private

businessRules.name: Version Pin Update
businessRules.description: pfc-version must be updated on every release
businessRules.condition: IF Release is created for a PFITarget
businessRules.action: THEN VersionPin with pinType 'pfc-version' MUST be updated to Release.releaseTag

joinPatterns.name: Pipeline delivers PE Process
joinPatterns.description: Links a CI/CD pipeline to the process engineering process it delivers

joinPatterns.name: Release tracks PPM Project
joinPatterns.description: Links a release to the PPM project it belongs to

joinPatterns.name: Workflow orchestrated by EMC EventChain
joinPatterns.description: Links a workflow to its event-driven orchestration chain

joinPatterns.name: PFI owned by Organisation
joinPatterns.description: Links a PFI target to its owning organisation

joinPatterns.name: Protection governed by GRC Framework
joinPatterns.description: Links protection layers to the governance framework they implement

joinPatterns.name: Release measured by KPI
joinPatterns.description: Links release outcomes to KPI metrics for tracking delivery performance

changeControl.changeNotes: Compliance fix: G2C resolved by adding cicd:filteredBy (PFITarget→SeriesFilter) and cicd:syncsConventions (Pipeline→ConventionManifest) to connect orphaned entities. G8 resolved by renaming cicd:ownerOrganisation to cicd:ownedByOrganisation (verb-form camelCase). 13 entities, 20 relationships (13 internal + 7 cross-ontology), 11 business rules, 6 join patterns.

versionHistory.notes: Initial creation. Models the PF-Core hub-and-spoke CI/CD architecture implemented in pfc-v1.0.0. 13 entities, 18 relationships (11 internal + 7 cross-ontology), 11 business rules, 6 join patterns.
